data.title: U.S. Probes Bitmain Over National Security Risks in “Operation Red Sunset”
data.description:
The U. S. government has opened a sweeping national security investigation into Bitmain Technologies, China’s largest manufacturer of Bitcoin-mining machines, according to a Bloomberg report dated November 21, 2025. The probe, internally codenamed “Operation Red Sunset,” is being led by the Department of Homeland Security and focuses on whether Bitmain hardware poses espionage or infrastructure-sabotage risks […] The post U
source: https://www.ethnews.com/u-s-probes-bitmain-over-national-security-risks-in-operation-red-sunset/

data.title: Bitwise CEO: Over $40 million in ETF inflows into our company indicate crypto assets are cheap enough; we will seize the opportunity to buy.
data.description: Bitwise CEO Hunter Horsley posted on the X platform, "Currently, there are over $40 million in inflows across three different Bitwise ETFs in the US. Some people may be selling, but ETF investors are buying. Most people can't perfectly time the bottom, and the best approach is to buy when the assets you like look cheap. And for many people, (currently) assets look cheap enough. I think we'll see this moment as an opportunity."

data.title: BNB Drops Below 820 USDT with a 4.91% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Nov 22, 2025, 05:41 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 820 USDT and is now trading at 819.809998 USDT, with a narrowed 4.91% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitwise ETFs Experience Significant Inflows Amid Market Dynamics
data.description: According to Odaily, Bitwise CEO Hunter Horsley shared insights on the X platform, revealing that three distinct Bitwise ETFs in the United States have collectively attracted over $40 million in inflows. While some investors may be selling, ETF investors are actively purchasing. Horsley emphasized that most individuals cannot perfectly time the market bottom, suggesting that the best approach is to buy assets when they appear undervalued. He noted that, for many, current crypto assets seem sufficiently cheap, and he believes this moment will be viewed as an opportunity.

data.title: F2Pool co-founder Wang Chun: Currently holding cash and observing the situation.
data.description: F2Pool co-founder Wang Chun responded to comments on the X platform, stating that he currently holds USDT and USDC stablecoins and is observing the market. Previously, on November 17th, he deposited 3500 ETH into Binance.

data.title: Planet Midday News
data.description: 1. Bitcoin's largest drop in the past 10 days reached 25%, and the hashtag "Bitcoin crash, over 400,000 liquidated" topped the Douyin trending list; 2. Coinbase CEO: The acquisition of Vector.fun signifies the beginning of introducing native SOL technology and talent, which will improve Coinbase's support for Solana trading; 3. Strategy claims to have persisted in buying BTC even when it fell to 50% of its purchase cost during the last bear market, hinting at continued accumulation; 4. Moonrock Capital founder: Coinbase's acquisition of Vector.fun is suspected of insider trading, and TNSR plummeted 40% after rising 8 times in two days; 5. Nakamoto CEO: MSCI's removal of digital asset reserve companies highlights industry discrimination and conflicts of interest, and regulatory agencies should intervene and investigate; 6. Trader Eugene posted "surrendering to the market": licking his wounds and waiting to see what happens; 7. Opinion: Powell may face serious internal resistance, and the December rate cut meeting may see multiple dissenting votes; 8. Aave founder: will... ETHLend will be relaunched in 2026; 9. Aerodrome: The official main domain may be under DNS hijacking, please do not use it, under investigation; 10. Satoshi Nakamoto's assets have lost $47 billion from their historical high, a loss ratio of 34%.

data.title: Cybersecurity giant CrowdStrike fires insider working with hackers
data.description:
Texas-based American cybersecurity firm CrowdStrike has reportedly fired an employee accused of leaking internal information to a cybercrime collective that has recently claimed responsibility for corporate breaches involving Salesforce-connected systems. The security firm dismissed the “insider” after it found that they worked with the group known as Scattered Lapsus$ Hunters, who began publishing alleged internal […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/crowdstrike-fires-insider-hackers/

data.title: Grayscale CEO: Since the Ethereum ETF supported staking rewards, it has generated $7.9 million in revenue.
data.description: Peter Mintzberg, CEO of digital asset management company Grayscale, stated in an article on the X platform that since its two Ethereum exchange-traded funds, Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF and Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF (ETH), enabled staking rewards, they have generated $7.9 million in returns for investors, making them the highest-yielding products in their category.

data.title: US-listed mF International plans to raise $500 million to establish a BCH treasury.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed mF International announced it will raise $500 million through a private placement (PIPE) of 50 million Class A ordinary shares and prepaid warrants to accredited institutional investors at $10.00 per share. The financing transaction is expected to close on December 1, 2025, and the proceeds will be used to purchase Bitcoin Cash and establish a related digital asset treasury. (stocktitan)

data.title: Grayscale's Ethereum ETFs Generate $7.9 Million in Staking Rewards
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Grayscale's CEO Peter Mintzberg announced on the X platform that the company's Ethereum exchange-traded funds, Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF and Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF, have generated $7.9 million in staking rewards for investors. These funds have become the most profitable among similar products by supporting staking rewards.

data.title: Aerodrome Investigates Suspected DNS Hijacking Incident
data.description: According to PANews, decentralized trading platform Aerodrome announced on the X platform that it is investigating a suspected DNS hijacking incident. Aerodrome has advised users to refrain from using its main domain during the investigation.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $238 million yesterday, with Fidelity FBTC leading the way with a net inflow of $108 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $238 million yesterday (November 21, Eastern Time). The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was Fidelity ETF FBTC, with a net inflow of $108 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $11.798 billion. This was followed by Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF BTC, with a net inflow of $84.9339 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $1.951 billion. The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was BlackRock ETF IBIT, with a net outflow of $122 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $62.703 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $110.11 billion, with an ETF net asset ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Bitcoin's total market capitalization) of 6.53%, and a cumulative net inflow of $57.635 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $55.7113 million yesterday, reversing eight consecutive days of net outflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (November 21, Eastern Time), Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $55.7113 million. The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was the Fidelity ETF (FETH), with a net inflow of $95.3989 million, bringing FETH's historical total net inflow to $2.542 billion. This was followed by the Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF (ETH), with a net inflow of $7.7347 million, bringing ETH's historical total net inflow to $1.424 billion. The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was the BlackRock ETF (ETHA), with a net outflow of $53.6827 million, bringing ETHA's historical total net inflow to $12.89 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF is $16.859 billion, with an ETF net asset ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization) of 5.1%, and a cumulative net inflow of $12.632 billion.

data.title: Robert Kiyosaki Sells Bitcoin for Significant Profit, Plans Future Investments
data.description: According to PANews, Robert Kiyosaki, the author of 'Rich Dad Poor Dad,' announced on the X platform that he sold Bitcoin valued at $2.25 million for approximately $90,000 each. These Bitcoins were originally purchased a few years ago at $6,000 per coin. Kiyosaki used the proceeds to acquire two surgical centers and invest in a billboard company. Despite the sale, he remains optimistic about Bitcoin and intends to increase his holdings in the future.

data.title: Cardano experienced a chain fork due to an incorrect order format, but no user funds were lost.
data.description: A blockchain forked into two chains on Friday due to a malformed proxy transaction triggering a software vulnerability. The transaction passed verification on newer nodes but was rejected by older software versions, causing the network to split. Cardano's ecosystem governance organization, Intersect, stated in its incident report that the "toxic transaction" exploited a vulnerability in the underlying software library, splitting the network into a "poisoned chain" containing the transaction and a "healthy chain" not containing it. Co-founder Charles Hoskinson initially claimed it was a "premeditated attack," but a user named Homer J. later publicly admitted responsibility, stating that he was negligent in attempting to reproduce the "toxic transaction" and relied on AI-generated instructions. The user stated that he had no malicious intent and did not gain any financial benefit from it. Intersect confirmed that no users suffered financial losses, and most retail wallets were unaffected. The price of the ADA token fell by more than 6% as a result of the incident. (Decrypt)

data.title: Satoshi Nakamoto's assets have decreased by $47 billion from their all-time high, representing a loss of 34%.
data.description: According to Arkham's monitoring, (as the price of BTC has plummeted) Satoshi Nakamoto's address has lost $47 billion, reducing his personal wealth to $90.7 billion, the lowest point since reaching an all-time high of $137 billion last October. The $47 billion loss resulting from the market downturn represents approximately 34% of his all-time high net worth.

data.title: The US government transferred assets worth $7.5 million this morning, including NEXO, WETH, and TRX.
data.description: Arkham officially announced on the X platform that the US government transferred another $7.5 million worth of cryptocurrency this morning. In the past 24 hours, the US government transferred $300,000 in NEXO, $3 million in WETH, and $4.2 million in TRX. The NEXO and TRX were seized from Alameda between 2022 and 2024, while the WETH was seized from Bitfinex hacker Ilya Lichtenstein between the same period.
